author: cristian_1337
content:
Hey everyone, since the fellowship started I've been diving into multiple areas, and this week particularly into CL node sync methods, into light clients, the light client sync protocol and the decentralized checkpoint sync idea. I've done a pretty deep research of it and I have some open questions regarding it, but it's one of the projects that I've found the most interesting and challenging so far, so I want to flag my interest into it.
I've been focused on Rust and mainly on the Lighthouse codebase lately, I'm considering working on adding decentralized checkpoint sync support in Lighthouse.
Note that I'm still exploring a couple of other ideas in parallel, but I wanted to flag this one since I think it's a very interesting problem that I'd like to work on
